Hi, Diogo. Welcome. Could you introduce yourself to the group?
Of course. My name is Diogo Leal, and I am a project manager at Oracle.
Wonderful. How long have you worked in technology?
I have worked in technology for more than ten years. My main strength is solving complex problems.

Hi Diogo, this is Sophia from the Oracle leadership forum. Thank you for connecting with me last week. I am calling because we have a panel of new partners next Friday, and I would love for you to introduce yourself to the group. Please keep it short and confident. Tell them your role, one strong project, and what you are passionate about. A concise, memorable introduction always builds good rapport. If you can, highlight your work with international teams. I am sure you will do great. Send me a message when you are ready, and we will talk about the details. Talk to you soon.

Hello, everyone. My name is Diogo Leal, and it is a pleasure to meet you. I am an IT project manager at Oracle, here in Sao Paulo. I have worked in technology for more than ten years, and I usually lead teams across different countries. My main strength is turning a complex problem into a simple plan. Right now, I am managing a project that connects our offices in three regions. I am passionate about technology that helps people work better together. I would love to learn about your projects too. Thank you for your time, and I hope we can stay in touch.

Diogo opens his notes and writes his role at Oracle. He chooses one strong project to highlight. He practices a short and concise introduction. He records his pitch with a confident voice. Finally, he meets the group and builds a friendly rapport.
